title_en: Hadiths on Ethics, Manners, and Spiritual Topics
content_en:
Jami' Al-Tirmidhi contains extensive sections on ethics, manners (adab), and spiritual topics that are among the most beloved in the collection. Al-Tirmidhi was particularly attentive to the ethical and spiritual dimensions of the prophetic teaching, and his collection is correspondingly rich in these areas. Al-Mubarakpuri's commentary on these sections brings out their depth with careful explication.

The book of manners (Kitab al-Adab) in Al-Tirmidhi's Jami' contains hadiths on a comprehensive range of social etiquette: the proper forms of greeting, the etiquette of sneezing and yawning, the rights of the road, the proper treatment of animals, and hundreds of specific guidance points about daily social life. Al-Mubarakpuri explains each hadith's meaning and notes the legal position derived from it — whether obligatory, recommended, or merely permitted — while tracing the chain quality.

The sections on spiritual topics — the hardening and softening of the heart, asceticism (zuhd) toward worldly possessions, and the spiritual merits of various acts of worship — are among the most widely cited portions of the Jami'. Al-Mubarakpuri's commentary on these hadiths reflects both scholarly precision and spiritual appreciation, explaining the meanings carefully while conveying the transformative intent of the prophetic teaching.

Al-Tirmidhi's sections on the merits of the Quran (fada'il al-Quran) and on supplications (da'awat) receive careful treatment in the Tuhfah. Al-Mubarakpuri explains the hadiths about reciting specific surahs and their rewards, noting where these hadiths are well authenticated and where they are weaker, while presenting the scholars' positions on how to treat hadiths of different quality in the context of Quranic practice.

The eschatological sections of the Jami' — hadiths about the signs of the Hour, the conditions in the grave, the Day of Resurrection, paradise and hellfire — are treated by al-Mubarakpuri with particular care in matters of belief. He presents the mainstream Sunni approach to understanding these hadiths: accepting their meanings while not going into unnecessary detailed speculation about the nature of what is described.
title_id: Hadis-Hadis tentang Etika, Adab, dan Topik-Topik Spiritual
content_id:
Jami at-Tirmidhi memuat bagian-bagian yang luas tentang etika, adab, dan topik-topik spiritual yang termasuk paling dicintai dalam koleksi ini. At-Tirmidhi sangat memperhatikan dimensi etis dan spiritual dari ajaran kenabian, dan koleksinya pun kaya dalam bidang-bidang ini. Syarah al-Mubarakpuri atas bagian-bagian ini mengungkapkan kedalamannya melalui eksposisi yang cermat.

Kitab al-Adab dalam Jami at-Tirmidhi memuat hadis-hadis tentang etika sosial yang komprehensif: bentuk-bentuk sapaan yang tepat, adab bersin dan menguap, hak-hak jalan, perlakuan yang tepat terhadap hewan, dan ratusan poin panduan spesifik tentang kehidupan sosial sehari-hari. Al-Mubarakpuri menjelaskan makna setiap hadis dan mencatat posisi hukum yang diturunkan darinya, apakah wajib, sunnah, atau sekadar dibolehkan, sambil menelusuri kualitas sanad.

Bagian-bagian tentang topik-topik spiritual, yakni pengerasan dan pelunakan hati, zuhud terhadap harta duniawi, dan keutamaan-keutamaan spiritual dari berbagai amal ibadah, termasuk di antara bagian Jami yang paling banyak dikutip. Syarah al-Mubarakpuri atas hadis-hadis ini mencerminkan sekaligus ketepatan ilmiah dan apresiasi spiritual, menjelaskan makna-makna secara cermat sambil menyampaikan maksud transformatif dari ajaran kenabian.

Bagian-bagian at-Tirmidhi tentang keutamaan Al-Quran (fadail al-Quran) dan tentang doa-doa mendapat pembahasan yang cermat dalam Tuhfah. Al-Mubarakpuri menjelaskan hadis-hadis tentang membaca surah-surah tertentu dan pahalanya, mencatat di mana hadis-hadis tersebut terotentikasi dengan baik dan di mana lebih lemah, sambil memaparkan posisi para ulama tentang cara memperlakukan hadis-hadis berkualitas berbeda dalam konteks praktik Al-Quran.

Bagian-bagian eskatologis Jami, yaitu hadis-hadis tentang tanda-tanda Hari Kiamat, kondisi di dalam kubur, Hari Kebangkitan, surga dan neraka, dibahas oleh al-Mubarakpuri dengan kehati-hatian khusus dalam masalah aqidah. Ia memaparkan pendekatan Sunni arus utama dalam memahami hadis-hadis ini: menerima maknanya tanpa masuk ke dalam spekulasi terperinci yang tidak perlu tentang hakikat apa yang digambarkan.
